# AI4PB Wrap-up Skill

Use `#ai4pb-wrapup` for sprint closure and verified-task status synchronization.

Execution rule:
1. Run the wrap-up workflow only.
2. Follow the wrap-up prompt strictly.
3. Do not add out-of-scope tasks.
